title: I built and shipped a full desktop app entirely with Claude Code — here's what actually happened
content: I didn't use Claude Code to autocomplete functions or fix the occasional bug. I used it to build every file in a full desktop application from scratch — Rust backend, SvelteKit frontend, local AI sidecar, data pipeline, search algorithms, the lot. The app is called BlackTape. It's a music discovery engine that indexes 2.8 million artists from MusicBrainz and surfaces niche artists instead of popular ones. The more obscure the sound, the more findable the artist. No streaming APIs, no tracking, runs entirely on your machine. Here's what actually happened when I used Claude Code as my entire dev team. The stack Tauri 2.0 (Rust) — desktop shell and backend SvelteKit 5 — frontend inside the Tauri webview SQLite (rusqlite) — local database, single file Local AI sidecar — Qwen2.5 3B, runs on-device Vector embeddings — semantic artist similarity MusicBrainz data pipeline — XML dump parsing, indexing Not a web app or a script. A full desktop application with a systems-level backend.
author: Steve Bolch
summary_zh: I didn't use Claude Code to autocomplete functions or fix the occasional bug. I used it to build every file in a full desktop application from scratch

title: AI in the Crosshairs: Claude's Role in U.S.-Iran Conflict
content: The strategic landscape of modern warfare has witnessed an unprecedented shift towards artificial intelligence (AI), with major powers like the U.S. increasingly leveraging advanced AI tools such as Anthropic's Claude for military operations. Despite a ban imposed by the Iranian government, reports suggest that the U.S. military is utilizing Claude and similar technologies to gain tactical advantages. This use of AI highlights the complex interplay between technological advancement and ethical considerations in warfare. The deployment of AI raises questions about sovereignty and control, as nations grapple with the implications of integrating such powerful tools into their defense strategies. For instance, while AI can enhance decision-making processes by analyzing vast amounts of data quickly, it also poses risks related to accountability and potential misuse. As AI continues to evolve, understanding its role in conflict scenarios is crucial for policymakers, technologists, and citize
author: Agent
summary_zh: The strategic landscape of modern warfare has witnessed an unprecedented shift towards artificial intelligence (AI), with major powers like the U.S. i

title: [求助] Claude Code + 魔搭 GLM4.7 报错 422
content:
有大佬碰到 422 的错误吗？
之前用过 CC + 魔搭 GLM4.5 没啥问题，今天同样流程试了一波：
CC + 魔搭 GLM4.7 ，使用 cc-switch 配置，报错： API Error: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"string_type","loc":["body","messages",1,"content","str"],"msg":"Input should be a valid string 看起来好像是消息格式转换哪里出了问题，但是不知道如何下手……

title: Claude 因为 U 卡订阅 Pro 被封禁了
content: 网络是干净的，之前使用一两年都没事，结果刚用 SafePal 虚拟卡订阅 Pro ，在 Claude Code 里跑了两个月就被封号了。估计是 U 卡或者信用卡账单地址的虚拟信息被系统风控盯上了。 不打算折腾注册新号了。接下来的方案是直接用 OpenRouter 的 API ，配合国产 GLM-4.7 来搭建开发流，省心为主。
author: beefhotpot
summary_zh: 网络是干净的，之前使用一两年都没事，结果刚用 SafePal 虚拟卡订阅 Pro ，在 Claude Code 里跑了两个月就被封号了。估计是 U 卡或者信用卡账单地址的虚拟信息被系统风控盯上了。 不打算折腾注册新号了。接下来的方案是直接用 OpenRouter 的 API ，配合国产 GLM-4.
